_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill in assessing the predictive power and subsequent generalizability of a model.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of model interpretability and explainability methods, including SHAP values, LIME, partial dependence plots, and when explanation requirements should influence model selection.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI AG domain. AG-K-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RM-A-001 (RM, cosine: 0.494), RM-K-010 (RM, cosine: 0.488).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.6/10 (raw 0.562). Shared vocabulary: [model]. DCWF-only terms [assessing, generalizability, power, predictive, skill, subsequent] vs WIDAI-only terms [dependence, explainability, explanation, influence, interpretability, knowledge] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.874 (P=0.889, R=0.859). P exceeds R by 0.030 — the DCWF element's 12 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 22 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Skill in assessing the predictive power and subsequent generalizability of a mod" and "Knowledge of model interpretability and explainability methods, including SHAP v" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.513 ≈ STS 0.562 (gap 0.049). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [model] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 10.3%. Shared tokens: [model]. DCWF-only: [assessing, generalizability, power, predictive, skill, subsequent]. WIDAI-only: [dependence, explainability, explanation, influence, interpretability, knowledge].
